template.name: Dockerfile
template.content:
FROM docker.1ms.run/eclipse-temurin:21.0.10_7-jdk LABEL maintainer="ThinkGem@163.com"
ENV TZ=Asia/Shanghai LANG=C.UTF-8 JAVA_OPTS="\ -Dspring.profiles.active=prod \ -DcustomLogPath=/data"
WORKDIR /app
#COPY jeesite.lic WEB-INF/ COPY ./maven/web.war ./
VOLUME /tmp /data
EXPOSE 8989
ENTRYPOINT ["sh", "-c","\ if [ -f 'web.war' ]; then jar -xvf web.war && rm web.war; fi && \ cd WEB-INF && exec sh startup.sh\ "] <% %>
